calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2013 Off Calendar

Request For Prove-Up Hearing And Application For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-17-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Laila Jadelrab Louridas, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, First Republic Bank.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Geoffrey Petrizze, Defendant's name may also be spelled "Geoffrey" Petrizze.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Raymond Rodriguez sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:
It is hereby ordered, adjudged and decreed that: Defendant Geoffrey Petrizze is permanently enoioned from and ordered to stay away, at all times, from the property known as the First Republic Bank branch office located 2001 Van Ness Avenue #1, San Francisco, California 94109, including but not limited to all common areas, storefronts and access points, entrances and exits, parking areas, locading zones, and all premises in entirety of this property, for any and all purposes whatsoever.
Judgment signed in open court.

Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar Jun-19-2013 Text Ruling

APPEARANCES - ATTY. EMILY CHARLEY OF THE LAW OFFICES OF HANSON BRIDGETT LLP, TEL. NO. 777-3200 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

Order To Show Cause regarding Preliminary Injunction- Preliminary Injunction is granted. No Opposition was filed. A valid Proof of service was presented in court. Order signed in open court.
